title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 41 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: New Year's Day
festivals.description: National public holiday marking the start of the new calendar year with celebrations across the UAE.

festivals.name: Dubai Marathon
festivals.description: One of the world's largest marathons with over 30,000 participants running through Dubai's iconic landmarks.

festivals.name: Arab Travel Market
festivals.description: Leading travel and tourism trade show in the Middle East attracting industry professionals from around the world.

festivals.name: Ajman Heritage Days
festivals.description: Celebration of Ajman's rich cultural heritage featuring traditional arts, crafts, music and local cuisine.

festivals.name: Dubai Shopping Festival
festivals.description: Month-long shopping extravaganza with discounts, entertainment, and cultural events across Dubai's malls and streets.

festivals.name: Dubai World Cup
festivals.description: World's richest horse race held at Meydan Racecourse, attracting elite equestrian competitors globally.

festivals.name: Sharjah Heritage Days
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Sharjah's cultural identity through traditional performances, crafts, and authentic Emirati experiences.

festivals.name: Ras Al Khaimah Food Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of regional and international cuisine with cooking demonstrations and culinary competitions.

festivals.name: Fujairah International Biennale
festivals.description: Contemporary art exhibition showcasing regional and international artists in Fujairah's cultural venues.

festivals.name: Umm Al Quwain Beach Festival
festivals.description: Beach-based festival featuring water sports, entertainment, and local food celebrations along Umm Al Quwain's coastline.

festivals.name: Eid Al Fitr
festivals.description: Islamic holiday marking the end of Ramadan with family gatherings, prayers, and festive celebrations across the UAE.

festivals.name: Dubai Duty Free Tennis Championships
festivals.description: Premier tennis tournament attracting world-ranked players competing in the desert courts of Dubai.

festivals.name: Abu Dhabi Film Festival
festivals.description: International film festival showcasing Arab and world cinema with screenings, seminars, and awards.

festivals.name: Sharjah International Book Fair
festivals.description: One of the largest book fairs in the Arab world attracting publishers and readers for literary celebrations.

festivals.name: Eid Al Adha
festivals.description: Islamic festival of sacrifice celebrated with prayers, feasts, and family reunions across the Emirates.

festivals.name: Islamic New Year
festivals.description: Islamic calendar new year marked as a public holiday with religious observances throughout the UAE.

festivals.name: Fujairah Eco-Tourism Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Fujairah's natural environment with hiking, wildlife viewing, and sustainable tourism activities.

festivals.name: Dubai Summer Surprises
festivals.description: Summer festival featuring entertainment, shopping deals, and family activities during the hot season.

festivals.name: Prophet Muhammad's Birthday
festivals.description: Islamic holiday celebrating the birth of Prophet Muhammad with religious prayers and communal gatherings.

festivals.name: Ajman Dhow Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of traditional Emirati maritime heritage featuring dhow races and seafaring exhibitions.

festivals.name: Sharjah Light Festival
festivals.description: Stunning light and art installations illuminate Sharjah's landmarks in this contemporary cultural celebration.

festivals.name: Ras Al Khaimah Half Marathon
festivals.description: Annual running event attracting local and international participants along scenic Ras Al Khaimah routes.

festivals.name: Abu Dhabi Grand Prix
festivals.description: Formula 1 racing championship on the Yas Marina Circuit, attracting top drivers and motorsport fans globally.

festivals.name: UAE National Day
festivals.description: National celebration marking the UAE's unification with parades, fireworks, and patriotic events across all emirates.

festivals.name: Umm Al Quwain Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Traditional cultural festival celebrating Umm Al Quwain's maritime heritage and local customs.

festivals.name: Sharjah Art Biennial
festivals.description: International contemporary art exhibition showcasing diverse artistic perspectives in Sharjah's galleries.

festivals.name: Dubai Food Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of global and Middle Eastern cuisine with chef collaborations and street food events.

festivals.name: Fujairah Water Sports Festival
festivals.description: Festival featuring diving, snorkeling, and marine activities showcasing Fujairah's rich underwater heritage.

festivals.name: Ajman Music Festival
festivals.description: Festival bringing classical and contemporary music performances to Ajman's cultural venues.

festivals.name: Ras Al Khaimah National Day Parade
festivals.description: Regional celebration of UAE National Day with parades, performances, and cultural exhibitions.

festivals.name: Abu Dhabi Music & Arts Festival
festivals.description: Multidisciplinary festival featuring international and Arab musicians, dancers, and visual artists.

festivals.name: Umm Al Quwain Sports Festival
festivals.description: Multi-sport event attracting athletes for competitions in traditional and modern sports.

festivals.name: Dubai Design Week
festivals.description: Premier design event showcasing emerging and established designers with installations and exhibitions.

festivals.name: Sharjah Organic & Farmers Market
festivals.description: Weekly weekend market celebrating local and organic produce with sustainable farming practices.

festivals.name: Fujairah Municipality Sport Festival
festivals.description: Annual sports competition showcasing various athletic disciplines across Fujairah.

festivals.name: Abu Dhabi Classics
festivals.description: International classical music festival featuring world-renowned orchestras and soloists.

festivals.name: Dubai Gourmet Festival
festivals.description: Culinary celebration featuring Michelin-starred chefs and gastronomic experiences across Dubai.

festivals.name: Ajman Art Exhibition
festivals.description: Contemporary and traditional art showcase by local and regional artists in Ajman's galleries.

festivals.name: Ras Al Khaimah Classics
festivals.description: Golf tournament set against the backdrop of Ras Al Khaimah's dramatic mountain landscapes.

festivals.name: Sharjah Comedy Festival
festivals.description: Entertainment festival featuring stand-up comedy performers from across the Middle East and internationally.

festivals.name: Umm Al Quwain Aquatic Festival
festivals.description: Beach and water-based celebration featuring marine activities and traditional boat exhibitions.
